title: Zombification Potion
description: Adds a potion that allows villagers to be zombified more easily for better trading optimization.
body:

# Zombification Potion

A simple Fabric mod that adds a special potion allowing players to zombify villagers more easily.

Perfect for players who want to optimize villager trading halls without relying on dangerous zombie setups.

## Features
- Easy villager zombification
- Survival-friendly balancing
- Fabric compatible
- Lightweight and simple

## Compatibility
- Minecraft 1.26.1.2
- Fabric Loader

## Installation
Requires Fabric API.
